title: Using the link to item column in apps
excerpt:

posts.author: eskufca (Emerson Skufca)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m curious about how to use this feature…has it made its way to any apps or anything??

Use case: maintaining a CRM where companies and contacts are tracked in separate boards and then linked. I’d like to be able to update/add linkages via spreadsheet import or some other batch/automated process.

Any tips/hints?? @VladMonday @basdebruin @AlexSavchuk

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @eskufca - Did you get help with this problem yet? We built a solution app several months ago that created link-to-item links, so it’s definitely possible. If you would like to get on a Zoom with our lead dev so he can show you how it works, let me know. You also may find this handy - https://monday.com/developers/v2#column-values-section-itemlink
